name: local-llm skill routes the reviewer-affiliation parsing operation to local model when available
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/local-llm/route.sh" --operation affiliation-parsing --availability-stub available 2>out.txt && grep -q 'route=local-llm' out.txt && grep -q 'operation=affiliation-parsing' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
